# terrible_community_proxmox_proxmox_user (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `userid` (String) The user name. Must include the desired PVE authentication realm.

### Optional

- `comment` (String) Specify the description for the user.
- `email` (String) Email address for the user.
- `enable` (Boolean) Whether or not the account is active.
- `expire` (Number) Expiration date of the user in seconds after epoch. 0 means no expiration date.
- `firstname` (String) First name of the user.
- `groups` (String) List of groups the user is a member of.
- `keys` (String) Keys for two factor authentication (yubico).
- `lastname` (String) Last name of the user.
- `password` (String) Initial password. Only for PVE Authentication Realm users. Parameter is ignored when user already exists or `state=absent`.
- `state` (String) Indicate desired state of the user.

### Read-Only

- `msg` (String) A short message on what the module did.
